# @kubernetes-models/pulsar-resources-operator

## 1.0.0

### Major Changes

- [#255](https://github.com/tommy351/kubernetes-models-ts/pull/255) [`f4bbf66`](https://github.com/tommy351/kubernetes-models-ts/commit/f4bbf667df2271f8b5fd3cc5cf2dedb3bc0ce39a) Thanks [@tommy351](https://github.com/tommy351)! - Migrate to ESM only package.

- [#255](https://github.com/tommy351/kubernetes-models-ts/pull/255) [`d4280f7`](https://github.com/tommy351/kubernetes-models-ts/commit/d4280f7f316ac9c149a06c364e8d5d941e23ade1) Thanks [@tommy351](https://github.com/tommy351)! - Require Node.js 22+.

### Minor Changes

- [#257](https://github.com/tommy351/kubernetes-models-ts/pull/257) [`d4ff268`](https://github.com/tommy351/kubernetes-models-ts/commit/d4ff268e0806c4145a58057aa2950823686cf768) Thanks [@tommy351](https://github.com/tommy351)! - Add `RoleBinding` CRD (`resource.streamnative.io`).

- [#257](https://github.com/tommy351/kubernetes-models-ts/pull/257) [`0d1ec17`](https://github.com/tommy351/kubernetes-models-ts/commit/0d1ec171a20f3af23ddbd045c1309caace8d4e39) Thanks [@tommy351](https://github.com/tommy351)! - Update CRDs to v0.19.0.
